title: nania stipularis
intro: Nania stipularis, also known as the 'Stick-tight' or 'Stickyweed', is a flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly found in the tropical and subtropical regions of the world. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and dysentery, due to its antidiarrheal and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antiseptic, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Nania stipularis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
